raw_title: From Automation to Transformation with AI-Tools: Exploring the Professional Norms and the Perceptions of Responsible AI in a News Organization
title_en: From Automation to Transformation with AI-Tools: Exploring the Professional Norms and the Perceptions of Responsible AI in a News Organization
title_zh: 从自动化到AI工具转型：探索新闻机构中的专业规范与负责任AI的认知
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了新闻机构如何从简单的自动化转向使用AI工具进行更深层次的转型。它关注记者和编辑如何看待AI在新闻工作中的责任问题，以及AI如何影响他们的工作方式和专业标准。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how news organizations move from basic automation to deeper transformation using AI tools. It focuses on how journalists and editors perceive responsible AI in their work and how AI affects their professional practices and standards.
research_direction_zh: 研究新闻业中AI技术的采纳与影响，特别关注专业规范、伦理认知和组织变革过程。
research_direction_en: Research on the adoption and impact of AI technologies in journalism, with particular focus on professional norms, ethical perceptions, and organizational change processes.
